title: Solid Lovely Pink Paper Honeycomb Ball (20cm) 1 Piece - Hanging Decoration, Versatile & Elegant Party Decor
features: SOLID LOVELY PINK HONEYCOMB BALL DESIGN: Add a touch of sophistication and elegance to your event with our 20cm solid lovely pink paper honeycomb ball, perfect for creating a stunning visual impact and enhancing any party atmosphere.

HIGH-QUALITY PAPER MATERIAL: Crafted from durable and eco-friendly paper, this hanging decoration is not only visually appealing, but also lightweight and easy to set up, ensuring hassle-free party preparation.

STYLISH PARTY DECOR: Ideal for a wide range of events and celebrations such as birthdays, weddings, anniversaries, Halloween, or thematic parties; this versatile honeycomb ball complements various color schemes and adds a contemporary touch to your venue.
ALL-IN-ONE PARTY SOLUTION: Our 1-piece set provides effortless and stylish party décor that comfortably fits any budget, saving time and money on coordinating multiple decoration pieces.

EASY TO HANG & REUSABLE: With its convenient hanging loop, you can quickly install and position the honeycomb ball to your desired location, adding dimension to your space, and when the party is over, simply fold it flat for easy storage and future use.
description: Product Description Create a stunning party décor with this Baby Pink Honeycomb Tissue Paper Ball. Made of delicate tissue paper, this delightful hanging decoration is lightweight and can be hung easily from the ceiling or a doorway to bring style to any special occasion. Create a dazzling horizon over an entire celebration by hanging these honeycomb paper balls with matching streamers, decorative fans and tissue paper pom poms at varying lengths from the ceiling throughout the venue. Manufacturer's Description Make it look like you spent hours decorating your party space with this versatile Baby Pink Paper Ball Decoration. Made of delicate tissue paper, this blossoming pink hanging decoration is lightweight and can be easily hung from the ceiling or a doorway to bring style to your baby shower, bridal shower, girl's birthday party, christening or other special occasion. Create a dazzling horizon over your entire celebration by hanging honeycomb paper balls with matching streamers, decorative fans, and tissue paper pom poms at varying lengths from the ceiling throughout your venue. To really personalize your party, be sure to coordinate this pretty paper honeycomb with other Baby Pink party decorations and party supplies. Our Baby Pink Honeycomb Tissue Paper Ball measures 20cm (8") in diameter and is sold individually. Box Contains 1 x Honeycomb Paper Ball See more
